languages.text: Тварь, известная как Погонщица, не позволяет Лорд-капитану связаться с флагманом и покинуть Зарков. Более того, она избрала своим логовом место возле склепа Себериана, меч которого и разыскивает {name}.

The creature known as the Drover is preventing the Lord Captain from contacting the flagship and leaving Zarkov. Moreover, it has made its lair near the crypt of Seberian von Valancius, whose sword {name} is seeking.
languages.original_text: Тварь, известная как Погонщица, не позволяет Лорд-капитану связаться с флагманом и покинуть Зарков. Более того, она избрала своим логовом место возле склепа Себериана, меч которого и разыскивает {name}.

traits.locale_text: The creature known as the Drover is preventing the Lord Captain from contacting the flagship and leaving Zarkov. Moreover, it has made its lair near the crypt of Seberian von Valancius, whose sword {name} is seeking.
The creature known as the Drover is preventing the Lord Captain from leaving Zarkov. Moreover, it has made its lair near the crypt of Seberian von Valancius, the one whom {name} is seeking.
The creature known as the Drover is preventing the Lord Captain from leaving Zarkov. Moreover, it has made its lair near the crypt of Seberian von Valancius, the one whom {name} is seeking.

The creature known as the Drover is preventing the Lord Captain from contacting the flagship and leaving Zarkov. Moreover, it has made its lair near the crypt of Seberian von Valancius, whose sword {name} is seeking.

languages.text: ザルコフを脱出を阻む「ドローバー」と呼ばれる生き物。しかも、セベリアン・フォン・ヴァランキウスの墓の近くで巣を作っている。{name}が探している人物の墓だ。
languages.original_text: The creature known as the Drover is preventing the Lord Captain from leaving Zarkov. Moreover, it has made its lair near the crypt of Seberian von Valancius, the one whom {name} is seeking.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフを脱出を阻む「ドローバー」と呼ばれる生き物。しかも、セベリアン・フォン・ヴァランキウスの墓の近くで巣を作っている。{name}が探している人物の墓だ。

languages.text: La criatura conocida como el Pastor impide que {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán contacte con la nave insignia y abandone Zarkov. Además, tiene su guarida cerca de la cripta de Seberian von Valancius, cuya espada busca {name}.
languages.original_text: The creature known as the Drover is preventing the Lord Captain from contacting the flagship and leaving Zarkov. Moreover, it has made its lair near the crypt of Seberian von Valancius, whose sword {name} is seeking.

traits.locale_text: La criatura conocida como el Pastor impide que {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán contacte con la nave insignia y abandone Zarkov. Además, tiene su guarida cerca de la cripta de Seberian von Valancius, cuya espada busca {name}.

languages.text: Die als Treiber bekannte Kreatur hindert den Lord Captain daran, das Flaggschiff zu kontaktieren und Zarkov zu verlassen. Außerdem hat sie sich ausgerechnet in der Krypta von Seberian von Valancius eingenistet, dessen Schwert {name} sucht.
languages.original_text: The creature known as the Drover is preventing the Lord Captain from contacting the flagship and leaving Zarkov. Moreover, it has made its lair near the crypt of Seberian von Valancius, whose sword {name} is seeking.

traits.locale_text: Die als Treiber bekannte Kreatur hindert den Lord Captain daran, das Flaggschiff zu kontaktieren und Zarkov zu verlassen. Außerdem hat sie sich ausgerechnet in der Krypta von Seberian von Valancius eingenistet, dessen Schwert {name} sucht.

languages.text: Une créature surnommée « Chasseur » empêche {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} de contacter le vaisseau amiral et de quitter Zarkov. Elle s'est installée dans la crypte de Seberian von Valancius, dont {name} recherche l'épée.
languages.original_text: The creature known as the Drover is preventing the Lord Captain from contacting the flagship and leaving Zarkov. Moreover, it has made its lair near the crypt of Seberian von Valancius, whose sword {name} is seeking.

traits.locale_text: Une créature surnommée « Chasseur » empêche {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} de contacter le vaisseau amiral et de quitter Zarkov. Elle s'est installée dans la crypte de Seberian von Valancius, dont {name} recherche l'épée.

languages.text: 名为“拒生花”的怪物切断了舰长大人与旗舰的联络，导致其无法离开扎尔科夫。不仅如此，它的巢穴就位于塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯的墓穴附近——{name}恰好在寻找他的宝剑。
languages.original_text: The creature known as the Drover is preventing the Lord Captain from contacting the flagship and leaving Zarkov. Moreover, it has made its lair near the crypt of Seberian von Valancius, whose sword {name} is seeking.

traits.locale_text: 名为“拒生花”的怪物切断了舰长大人与旗舰的联络，导致其无法离开扎尔科夫。不仅如此，它的巢穴就位于塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯的墓穴附近——{name}恰好在寻找他的宝剑。

languages.text: Çoban olarak bilinen yaratık, Lord Kaptan'ın sancak gemisiyle iletişim kurup Zarkov'dan ayrılmasını engelliyor. Üstelik inini, Lord Kaptan'ın kılıcını aradığı Seberian von Valancius'un mezar odasının yakınına yapmış.
languages.original_text: The creature known as the Drover is preventing the Lord Captain from contacting the flagship and leaving Zarkov. Moreover, it has made its lair near the crypt of Seberian von Valancius, whose sword {name} is seeking.

traits.locale_text: Çoban olarak bilinen yaratık, Lord Kaptan'ın sancak gemisiyle iletişim kurup Zarkov'dan ayrılmasını engelliyor. Üstelik inini, Lord Kaptan'ın kılıcını aradığı Seberian von Valancius'un mezar odasının yakınına yapmış.
